title: 4 Pack of Replacement 3 Meter Extenesion Power Wire Lead for LED 3 String Light LED Transformers CZJUTAI Connector [LED4]
features: 【Reliable Replacement】This 3M LED Power Wire Lead is a perfect replacement for your CZJUTAI LED power transformers, ensuring a seamless and uninterrupted power supply for your LED lights.

【Waterproof Screw Type Connector】 Designed with a waterproof screw type DC 2 pin connector, this power wire lead provides secure and reliable connections, protecting your LED lights from moisture and water damage.
【High-Quality Materials】 Made from premium materials, this power wire lead is durable, sturdy, and built to last. It can withstand daily wear and tear, ensuring long-lasting performance.

【Easy to Install】 The power wire lead is designed for easy installation, allowing you to connect your LED power transformers effortlessly. Simply plug in the waterproof screw type DC 2 pin connector, and you're good to go.
【Versatile Compatibility】 This replacement power wire lead is compatible with CZJUTAI LED power transformers, making it suitable for a wide range of LED lighting applications.
